chord-line.comment: A `c:` / `c1:` / `c2:` line. Only the `c` instrument runs chord validation in markdown-it-music.
chord-line.name: meta.line.chord.music-markdown

lyric-line.comment: An `l:` / `l1:` ... line. Whole remainder is lyric text (raw passthrough in the renderer).
lyric-line.name: meta.line.lyric.music-markdown

voice-line.comment: Any other generic voice line (t1:, r1:, b1:, ...). markdown-it-music accepts arbitrary lowercase instrument names; content is raw text. Restricted to lowercase here to avoid matching ordinary prose like 'Note: ...'.
voice-line.name: meta.line.voice.music-markdown

chord.comment: Ported verbatim from markdown-it-music@2.0.5 lib/chord.js CHORD_PATTERN. Anchored to whole space-separated tokens via the trailing boundary. N.C. dots escaped to literal (the source leaves them unescaped).
chord.name: entity.name.function.chord.music-markdown

annotation.comment: Ported from markdown-it-music@2.0.5 ANNOTATION_PATTERN: a bar separator | or a (parenthetical).
annotation.name: comment.line.annotation.music-markdown

invalid-chord.comment: Any non-whitespace token on a chord line that is neither a valid chord nor an annotation. Flags typos like 'Gmja7'.
invalid-chord.name: invalid.illegal.chord.music-markdown
